name: Bacardi Rum Cake from Loren Martin
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle nuts in the bottom of a bundt pan.
2. Mix all cake ingredients together and pour over the nuts.
3. Bake for 1 hour at 325°F. Cool.
4. Invert the cake on a serving plate.
5. Prick the top and drizzle and smooth the glaze evenly over the top and sides.
6. Allow the cake to absorb the glaze. Repeat until the glaze is used up.
7. To make the glaze, melt butter in a saucepan.
8. Stir in water and sugar. Boil for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
9. Remove from heat and stir in rum.
